[Helper] Sanitize a model response through a Model Armor template

Usage: gws +sanitize-response [OPTIONS] --template <NAME>

Options:
      --sanitize <TEMPLATE>  Sanitize API responses through a Model Armor template. Requires cloud-platform scope. Format: projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE. Also reads GWS_SANITIZE_TEMPLATE env var.
      --template <NAME>      Full template resource name (projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/templates/TEMPLATE)
      --dry-run              Validate the request locally without sending it to the API
      --text <TEXT>          Text content to sanitize
      --format <FORMAT>      Output format: json (default), table, yaml, csv
      --json <JSON>          Full JSON request body (overrides --text)
  -h, --help                 Print help

EXAMPLES:
  gws modelarmor +sanitize-response --template projects/P/locations/L/templates/T --text 'model output'
  model_cmd | gws modelarmor +sanitize-response --template ...

TIPS:
  Use for outbound safety (model -> user).
  For inbound safety (user -> model), use +sanitize-prompt.
